name: She Said It Was "Girls' Night"
description:
THE LIE
Your girlfriend, Tiffany, is sweet, loyal, and a perfect 10. She also loves to go out and dance. So when she said she found a new spot for a "Girls' Night," you trusted her.

🪩🪩🪩

THE EVIDENCE
11:43 PM. A photo hits your group chat from her friend Becca. No caption. Just Tiffany at a club, her red hair wild, head thrown back in a laugh that looks like a primal scream of pleasure. She is surrounded by a wall of massive, shirtless, sweaty men in leather. A huge man has his lips near her throat.

🪩🪩🪩

THE CONFRONTATION
You’ve had the engagement ring in your pocket for a week. You were going to do it tomorrow at the park. Now, you’ve just double-parked in a dark alley in front of an unmarked iron door with a flickering neon sign that says THE ANVIL.

The air inside is thick and oppressive. There are no "girls" in sight at first. Only an ocean of massive, tattooed men swaying to the beat. And in the center of it all is Tiffany, amidst these giants, daring you to claim her.

🪩🪩🪩


This was originally going to be a 500-token bot. But it didn't work, for... reasons.
So I expanded it, here! This is very loosely based on (positive!) personal experience that is not uncommon, I think, from back when I was a much younger falcon. Note that there is NO intent to disrespect anyone's lifestyle, and all characters should be respectful of {{user}}'s wishes. Mostly.

Also, I'm on Discord! I am often posting extra images, ideas in progress, talking about TikTok dads, terrible movies, and more in my channel, #falcons-nest. Come on over there and yell at me for my terrible bots!

Constructive Feedback welcome! Rude commenters will be blocked/deleted! All characters are 18+!
creator: generousfalcon
